What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Maria S.

Tile by Nic did an amazing job installing new tile in my kitchen. The team was professional, efficient, and the finished product is stunning. I highly recommend them!

R
Robert B.

We hired Tile by Nic to install hardwood floors in our living room, and we're very happy with the results. A couple of minor issues came up, but they were quick to address them and ensure our satisfaction.

J
Jessica L.

Tile by Nic installed laminate flooring in our basement, and it looks fantastic. The price was very reasonable, and the installation was quick and clean. I would definitely use them again.

D
David M.

We needed new flooring in our bathroom, and Tile by Nic recommended vinyl. It’s perfect! Waterproof and looks great. The installers were professional and finished the job on time.

Additional Flooring Contractor Services

Tile by Nic — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every flooring contractor project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Tile by Nic Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific flooring contractor needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Tucson & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Tucson, AZ and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Tucson Oro Valley Marana Sahuarita Green Valley Catalina Foothills Vail South Tucson
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our flooring contractor services.

What type of tile is best for Tucson's climate?

Porcelain and ceramic tiles are excellent choices for Tucson's climate due to their durability, water resistance, and ability to withstand temperature fluctuations. Natural stone, when properly sealed, can also be a good option.

How long does tile installation typically take?

The duration of tile installation depends on the size and complexity of the project. A small bathroom backsplash might take a day or two, while a large floor installation could take several days to a week.

Do you offer tile removal services?

Yes, we provide complete tile removal services, including proper disposal of old materials. We take care to minimize dust and disruption during the removal process.

Built on Tucson Values

Get a free quote and discover the difference quality flooring can make.
